title: CulturalOrganization
description: A cultural organization in DCLA's constituency — a nonprofit arts/cultural group DCLA funds and serves (the grantee unit). Canonical schema reconciling 'DCLA Cultural Organizations' (u35m-9t32, 16 columns — the geocoded directory) and 'DCLA Cultural Organization Resources' (rb2h-bgai — website/description/area). Keyed on Organization Name.

area.description: Program / service area ('Area', from the Resources dataset).

description.description: Short description of the organization ('Description', from the Resources dataset).

website.description: Organization website ('Website', from the Resources dataset).
